hero.tagline: Bespoke travel experiences across Türkiye — luxury hotels, private transfers, and curated tours crafted for the discerning traveler.
destinations.subtitle: From the Bosphorus to the Cappadocian valleys, the Mediterranean to the Black Sea — each destination is a different chapter of one journey. Scroll to travel.
hotels.subtitle: Handpicked five-star hotels and boutique retreats across Türkiye's most captivating cities — curated for the discerning traveler.
cta.body: Join thousands of travelers who have discovered Türkiye the PoliTrip way. Your perfect journey begins with a single call.
booking.title: Plan Your Trip
booking.subtitle: Tell us a little about your dream trip and we'll send you a tailored quote within 24 hours.
booking.name: Full Name
booking.successBody: We'll get back to you within 24 hours with a personalised quote.
cta.footerNote: No booking fee. Response within 24 hours.
cta.whatsappMsg: Hello PoliTrip, I'm interested in planning a trip to Türkiye. Can you help me?
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse of the experiences waiting for you across Türkiye.
pricing.subtitle: Three tiers of luxury, every one with a personal concierge and zero booking fees.
pricing.tier1.name: Essential
pricing.tier1.desc: Premium transfers, guided city tours, curated hotel, and 24h support.
pricing.tier2.name: Premium
pricing.tier2.desc: Everything in Essential plus Bosphorus dinner cruise, Turkish bath experience, and flexible itinerary.
pricing.tier3.name: VIP
pricing.tier3.desc: Fully bespoke: helicopter transfers, private chef dinners, exclusive venue access, and a dedicated travel manager.
ribbon.headline: Every journey, a masterpiece
floating.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to inquire about a trip to Türkiye
floating.title: Chat with us on WhatsApp
floating.subtitle: Available 24/7
footer.brandBlurb: Crafting unforgettable luxury travel experiences across magnificent Türkiye.
slug.about.title: About Us
slug.about.headline: PoliTrip in brief
slug.about.body: We design premium journeys across Türkiye—VIP experiences, luxury stays, and seamless ground services from arrival to departure.
slug.team.title: Our Team
slug.team.headline: Concierge-first
slug.team.body: Arabic- and English-speaking planners, on-call duty staff, and vetted local partners keep every itinerary calm, clear, and on time.
slug.careers.title: Careers
slug.careers.headline: Join PoliTrip
slug.careers.body: We are growing our operations and guest-experience teams in Istanbul. Send your CV to careers@politrip.com—we read every message.
slug.press.title: Press
slug.press.headline: Media & partnerships
slug.press.body: For press kits, founder interviews, or partnership inquiries, write to press@politrip.com with your outlet and deadline.
slug.help.title: Help Center
slug.help.headline: Guest support
slug.help.body: For changes, refunds policy questions, or on-trip assistance, WhatsApp your duty number or email help@politrip.com with your booking reference.
slug.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
slug.privacy.headline: How we handle data
slug.privacy.body: We collect only what we need to run your trip—contacts, guest names, and booking references—and protect it with standard industry practices. A detailed policy will appear on this page soon.
slug.terms.title: Terms of Service
slug.terms.headline: Booking terms
slug.terms.body: Each proposal lists deposit, balance, and cancellation rules. A trip is confirmed once you approve the itinerary in writing and the agreed deposit is received.
slug.contact.title: Contact
slug.contact.headline: Reach PoliTrip
slug.contact.body: Email info@politrip.com, call any of the regional numbers in the site footer, or message us on WhatsApp. We typically reply within one business day.
slug.vision.title: Our Vision
slug.vision.headline: Redefining luxury travel in Türkiye
slug.vision.body: PoliTrip was born from a simple belief: high-end travel should feel effortless. We curate every detail — from the first inquiry to the final transfer — so guests experience Türkiye at its finest without a single logistical worry. Our vision is a world where premium travel is personal, seamless, and unforgettable.
slug.hotels.title: Partner Hotels
slug.hotels.headline: Handpicked luxury stays
slug.hotels.body: Every property in our portfolio is personally vetted for location, service quality, and guest experience. From boutique heritage palaces in Istanbul to cliffside retreats in Cappadocia and beachfront resorts in Antalya, our hotels are chosen to match the elevated standard our guests expect.
slug.vip.title: VIP Experience
slug.vip.headline: Travel without compromise
slug.vip.body: PoliTrip's VIP Experience is the highest tier of private travel in Türkiye.
vip.intro: PoliTrip's VIP tier places a dedicated concierge at your side from the moment your flight lands. Every transfer, every suite, every experience — arranged in advance, executed flawlessly.
vip.servicesTitle: Everything arranged. Nothing left to chance.
vip.servicesSubtitle: A curated suite of exclusive services, each available individually or as part of a fully bespoke itinerary.
vip.service1.title: Private Jet & Charter Flights
vip.service1.desc: Skip commercial terminals entirely. We arrange private jet charters and FBO handling so your journey begins the moment you board.
vip.service2.title: Yacht & Bosphorus Charters
vip.service2.desc: Cruise the Bosphorus or the Aegean on a private gulet or superyacht — sunset dinners, overnight anchoring, fully crewed.
vip.service3.title: Five-Star Hotel Suites
vip.service3.desc: Personally vetted five-star properties in Istanbul, Cappadocia, Antalya and beyond — reserved with priority access and VIP amenities.
vip.service4.title: Helicopter Transfers
vip.service4.desc: City-to-city or resort-to-resort helicopter transfers with panoramic views over the Bosphorus, Cappadocia valleys, and coastline.
vip.service5.title: Luxury Ground Transport
vip.service5.desc: A fleet of premium vehicles with professional chauffeurs, meet-and-greet at every arrival, and 24-hour availability.
vip.service6.title: Private Guides & Concierge
vip.service6.desc: Expert multilingual guides, exclusive after-hours access to major sites, restaurant reservations, and a dedicated on-call concierge.
vip.ctaTitle: Ready to experience Türkiye at its finest?
vip.ctaBody: Speak with our VIP concierge team and let us design your perfect journey — no templates, no compromises.
